source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/EN_60SIPT-602230C/EN 300 328 V2.2.2_2.4G BT EDR_ST60-SIPT,ST60-2230C_ER740701-08AD.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CE test report ER740701-08AD evaluates a Laird Connectivity 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module against EN 300 328 V2.2.2.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as product compliance evidence for CE testing against EN 300 328 V2.2.2, with ST60-2230C selected as the representative tested model.
keyPoints: The tested sample was declared evaluated and in compliance with EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07).
The report is a supplementary report to original ICC report no. ER740701AD, updating the standard version from V2.1.1 to V2.2.2 and applicant/brand names.

Summary test results show Pass for RF output power, hopping-related requirements, adaptivity, occupied channel bandwidth, transmitter unwanted emissions, receiver spurious emissions, and receiver blocking.
The maximum measured RF output power in the summary was 14.81 dBm against a 20 dBm limit.
The device has no geo-location capability.

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

entities.name: ST60-SIPT
entities.evidence: ST60-SIPT 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module SIPT only

concepts.name: Adaptivity
concepts.evidence: 4.3.1.7 Adaptivity Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Occupied channel bandwidth
concepts.evidence: 4.3.1.8 Occupied Channel Bandwidth Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Receiver blocking
concepts.evidence: 4.3.1.12 Receiver Blocking Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Geo-location capability
concepts.evidence: 4.3.1.13 Geo-location capability The device has no geo-location capability. N/A

evidence.claim: The report number is ER740701-08AD and the report version is Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: ER740701-08AD Page : 1 of 91 Report Version: Rev. 01

evidence.claim: The document is a CE Test Report for an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
evidence.evidenceText: CE Test Report Equipment : 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module

evidence.claim: The listed model number on the cover page is ST60-2230C.
The applicant is Laird Connectivity, Inc.
The applied standard is EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07).
The report was initially issued on Jul. 30, 2020.
The report is a supplementary report to original ICC report no. ER740701AD.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is issued as a supplementary report to original ICC report no. ER740701AD.

evidence.claim: The supplementary report updated the standard version from V2.1.1 to V2.2.2.
evidence.evidenceText: Updating standard version from V2.1.1 to V2.2.2.

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The EUT supports Bluetooth BR and EDR operation from 2402 MHz to 2480 MHz over channels 0-78.
evidence.evidenceText: Bluetooth Mode Ch. Frequency (MHz) Channel Number Data Rate 2400-2483.5 BR 2402-2480 0-78 [79] 1 Mbps 2400-2483.5 EDR 2402-2480 0-78 [79] 2 Mbps 2400-2483.5 EDR 2402-2480 0-78 [79] 3 Mbps

evidence.claim: The RF output power result passed with a measured value of 14.81 dBm.
The maximum RF output power limit is 20 dBm.
evidence.evidenceText: The maximum RF output power shall be equal to or less than 20 dBm

evidence.claim: Occupied channel bandwidth passed the applicable requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.1.8 Occupied Channel Bandwidth Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Transmitter unwanted emissions in the out-of-band domain passed the applicable requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.1.9 Transmitter unwanted emissions in the out of band domain Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Transmitter unwanted emissions in the spurious domain passed the applicable requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.1.10 Transmitter unwanted emissions in the spurious domain Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Receiver spurious emissions passed the applicable requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.1.11 Receiver spurious emissions Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Receiver blocking passed the applicable requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.1.12 Receiver Blocking Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: The device has no geo-location capability.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.1.13 Geo-location capability The device has no geo-location capability. N/A

evidence.claim: The test laboratory was International Certification Corp. with test sites TH01-WS and 05CH02-WS.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Laboratory International Certification Corp. Test Site TH01-WS ... Test Laboratory International Certification Corp. Test Site 05CH02-WS

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the source states CE Test Report and EN 300 328, but no regulator or notified body authority is explicitly identified.
Several emissions result pages appear as plot/table placeholders with notes but without extracted numeric rows, so only summary and visible tabular values were captured.
